motion_styles.name: natural casual
motion_styles.description: relaxed, everyday movement with organic weight and pacing

motion_styles.name: slow and deliberate
motion_styles.description: measured, intentional motion with clear weight and control

motion_styles.name: slow-motion ethereal
motion_styles.description: fluid ultra-slow movement, hair and fabric floating, hyper-detailed motion

motion_styles.name: fast-paced energetic
motion_styles.description: quick confident strides, rapid gestures, high-energy movement

motion_styles.name: floaty weightless
motion_styles.description: graceful low-gravity movement, gentle drift, soft landings

motion_styles.name: fluid graceful
motion_styles.description: dance-like flowing motion, smooth arcs, elegant transitions

motion_styles.name: mechanical robotic
motion_styles.description: stiff precise servo-like joint movement, calculated gestures

motion_styles.name: explosive action
motion_styles.description: sudden bursts of power, impact reactions, high-intensity force

motion_styles.name: subtle breathing
motion_styles.description: minimal movement, gentle chest rise, micro-expressions, stillness with life

motion_styles.name: epic cinematic
motion_styles.description: heroic dramatic movement, strong poses held and released, cinematic timing

motion_phases.name: entry into frame
motion_phases.description: subject moves or appears from outside the frame edge

motion_phases.name: sustained action
motion_phases.description: subject continues an ongoing motion throughout the clip

motion_phases.name: exit from frame
motion_phases.description: subject moves toward and beyond the frame edge

motion_phases.name: full action sequence
motion_phases.description: complete motion arc from start through peak to resolution

motion_phases.name: reaction moment
motion_phases.description: subject reacts to something — turns, pauses, responds expressively
